title: Electra One
writer: Alfonso Balcázar, Giovanni Simonelli, José Antonio de la Loma
actors: Jorge Martín, Vivi Bach, Klausjürgen Wussow
plot: A criminal organization led by a man named Elektra has found a serum capable of unleashing aggressive to anyone who furnishes. Aware of the news, the Soviet and American governments decide to join forces to stop the dangerous threat.
